name: Mina Ashiro
description: Mina is a very talented member of the Defense Force and an extremely talented marksman. She is the captain of the Defense Force's Third Division. When she was a child, she and [Kafka](https://anilist.co/character/180692/Kafka-Hibino) met each other after a Kaiju attack, swearing that they will both join the Defense Force and fight Kaiju alongside each other.
